home.title: Tale: The Sovereign AI Platform
home.description: Self-hosted AI platform for data-sensitive organizations — local AI models, agents, and automations on your own infrastructure. ISO 27001 & SOC 2 certified.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Two ways to run Tale: managed Enterprise built to scale, or the open-source Community edition. Per-user pricing, in CHF or EUR.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Get in touch with the Tale team. Connect with one of our domain experts to discuss your goals and find the best AI solution for your organization.

requestDemo.title: Request a demo
requestDemo.description: We help data-sensitive organizations automate workflows with private, reliable AI. Connect with a domain expert to explore solutions for your business.

hardwarePricing.title: Hardware Pricing
hardwarePricing.description: High-performance AI hardware — priced right. Run state-of-the-art models, anywhere.

hero.subtitle: Local AI models, agents, skills, and automations — on your own infrastructure, connected to your data

featureSecure.title: The Secure Platform for All Your Operations
featureSecure.description: Chat with AI, automate workflows, manage conversations across channels, and keep humans in the loop — in one place.

chat.label: Chat with AI
chat.description: An AI chat interface trained on your company's data, history, and documents — ask questions, search across systems, and get instant, accurate answers.

conversations.label: Conversations
conversations.description: Reply to email, chat, and voice from a single inbox. Tale keeps every channel on your infrastructure with full conversation history and routing.

automations.label: Automations
automations.description: Compose multi-step automations that connect tools, models, and humans. Trigger from any event and resume them on demand.

approvals.label: Approvals
approvals.description: Keep humans in the loop with explicit approval steps. Tale routes the right context to the right reviewers and audits every decision.

featureSectors.title: Built for Real Operational Work
featureSectors.description: Backed by a team that takes responsibility for your success — across industries and use cases.

hospitality.label: Hospitality
hospitality.description: Guide customers. Automate logistics. Support post-purchase tasks. Tale adapts to changing demand while maintaining brand trust

legal.label: Legal
legal.description: Draft, review, and route legal work with full audit trails. Tale keeps sensitive matter on your infrastructure while reducing turnaround time.

finance.label: Finance
finance.description: Reconcile, analyse, and report with strict controls. Tale connects to your data without sending it anywhere it shouldn't go.

featureGrid.title: Security, Privacy & Reliability
featureGrid.description: Core principles that help you run private AI on your terms.

independent.title: Independent by Design
independent.description: Self-operated, open source, on-prem or in cloud — so you stay independent from third-party SaaS, vendors, and lock-in.

stack.title: All from A to Z
stack.description: From hardware and software to support, consulting, and professional services — everything you need to run AI in production.

proven.title: Proven, Secure, Reliable
proven.description: A secure, reliable, and scalable platform with proven accuracy, built for mission-critical workflows.

needs.title: Built for Your Needs
needs.description: Use workflows that integrate with your existing infrastructure, so it fits the way you already operate.

independent.title: Independent & Transparent
independent.description: Swiss-based, vendor neutral and unbiased, always acting in our customers' best interest.

certified.title: Certified & Compliant
certified.description: Compliant with ISO 27001, SOC 2 and GDPR, with audit logs and data control so you always know where your data is stored.

sovereignty.a: Enterprise is billed per user/month, with two months free when paying yearly. Storage beyond the included quota is billed per TB/month. The Community edition stays free for self-hosted use.

dataResidency.q: Are there additional features in the Enterprise plan?
dataResidency.a: No. All product features are available in the open source version too. Enterprise adds extended support and services.

deployment.q: Do I have to bring my own AI models?
deployment.a: No. You can bring your own models, but it's not required. We support most major AI providers and don't add fees on top — cloud AI model usage is priced at the rates of your chosen provider and is not included in the plans.

cloudProviders.q: Can I use my preferred AI provider?
cloudProviders.a: Yes — we support all major cloud AI providers, so you can use your preferred provider while benefiting from better pricing, higher uptime, and usage-based billing.

pricing.a: Yes — we provide hardware on rental, leasing, or purchase terms. Mention it when you contact us and we'll quote the configuration that fits.

integrations.q: Can I use my own hardware and AI models?
integrations.a: Yes. We're hardware- and model-agnostic, so you're free to use your own.

support.q: Do you offer custom AI model training?
support.a: Yes. We train and fine-tune custom models for clients. If you're interested, bring it up in the demo call.

cta.title: Deploy Private AI on Your Terms
cta.description: Run a sovereign AI stack on your own infrastructure — get in touch.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Two ways to run Tale. Enterprise — managed, scalable, production-ready. Community — flexible, fully yours.
pricing.note: All product features are included in both Community and Enterprise. Additional Cloud AI model usage is priced at the rates of the provider.

community.tagline: Self-hosted open-source edition with community support.

enterprise.tagline: Fully managed, scalable, and production-ready — built for mission-critical private AI.

values.enterpriseSupport: Phone/SMS support, WhatsApp support, Remote support, Professional services

cloudProviders.description: We support OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and other major cloud AI providers in EU/CH — better pricing, higher uptime, and usage-based billing.

hardwarePricing.title: Hardware Pricing
hardwarePricing.description: High-performance AI hardware — priced right. Run state-of-the-art models, anywhere.
hardwarePricing.deploymentNote: All hardware configurations are silent (noise-free) and can be deployed at your site and maintained remotely by our team, or hosted in our secure data centers.

quality.tagline: Optimized for high-accuracy and consistent results.
quality.nodeTagline: Made for high-accuracy and consistent results.

hybrid.nodeTagline: Combines local data control with cloud inference.

speed.tagline: Optimized for fast responses and low latency.
speed.nodeTagline: Made for fast responses and low latency.

categories.ramInfo: Fast memory used for AI workloads, e.g. Video Memory (VRAM) or Unified Memory (UMA).
categories.umaInfo: Unified Memory Architecture — RAM shared between CPU and GPU on a single chip (Apple Silicon).
categories.vramInfo: Video RAM — dedicated memory on the GPU board.
categories.ddr5Info: Fifth-generation DDR SDRAM (faster, more efficient than DDR4).
categories.ddr5eccInfo: DDR5 with error-correcting code — server-grade memory that detects and corrects single-bit faults.
categories.int4Info: 4-bit integer quantization — trades a small amount of model precision for ~4× less memory.
categories.m2nvmeInfo: m.2 NVMe SSDs in a ZFS RAID pool — fast, redundant storage.
